response.justification: Wei Chen is a broadly experienced full-stack engineer, but the profile diverges sharply from this role's mandatory requirements. His C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a university thesis project, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no Fixed Income or capital-markets domain experience; RIDE Capital touched investment tooling but used a Node/TypeScript stack. SQL exposure appears general (MySQL/SQL listed) rather than deep SQL Server/Oracle work. Strong engineering fundamentals do not offset the missing core stack and domain.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput services at Dunnhumby)
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Broad polyglot background with proven ability to pick up new stacks quickly
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, and not on Windows platform
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle depth; database experience centers on MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and performance background
